name: Financial Services
description: Banking, investment, fintech. Excludes lending products (use 'credit') and insurance (use 'insurance').

regulatory_frameworks.name: US SEC/FINRA Fair Disclosure
regulatory_frameworks.summary: Investment advertising must include balanced disclosure of risks. Performance claims require specific disclaimers.

regulatory_frameworks.name: UK FCA Financial Promotions
regulatory_frameworks.summary: Financial promotions must be fair, clear, and not misleading. Risk warnings required.

regulatory_frameworks.name: EU MiFID II
regulatory_frameworks.summary: Marketing of financial instruments must be fair and not misleading. Target market assessment required.

guidance: Use 'credit' for lending products (credit cards, loans), 'insurance' for insurance products, and 'financial_services' for banking, investment, and fintech that don't involve credit decisions.
